testcase.name: test_bulk_upload_naukri_completes
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration39_bulk_instruction_messaging.py:102: in test_bulk_upload_naukri_completes assert _wait_until(done, timeout_s=25, poll=1.5), \ E AssertionError: naukri file not processed within 25s. status={'pending': [{'id': '69fa4d4bd931dc62516bc9d5', 'name': 'TEST_naukri_1778011467.csv', 'status': 'queued', 'size': 163}], 'processed': [{'id': '69fa4b39c676b48af6ab6a1a', 'name': 'probe.csv', 'size': 50, 'result': {'success': True, 'inserted': 1, 'updated': 0}}, {'id': '69fa47f2e8692dee574d9c2e', 'name': 'TEST_seq_1778010098_1.csv', 'size': 66, 'result': {'success': True, 'inserted': 1, 'updated': 0}}, {'id': '69fa3702fd64de1c438c75b8', 'name': 'Naukri-data-05052026.xlsx', 'size': 640097, 'result': {'success': True, 'inserted': 0, 'updated': 937}}], 'failed': []} E assert False E + where False = _wait_until(<function test_bulk_upload_naukri_completes.<locals>.done at 0xff88e676d4e0>, timeout_s=25, poll=1.5)

testcase.name: test_bulk_upload_pipeline_completes
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration39_bulk_instruction_messaging.py:132: in test_bulk_upload_pipeline_completes assert _wait_until(done, timeout_s=30, poll=1.5), \ E AssertionError: pipeline file not processed within 30s — possibly stuck on reprocess_matching. status={'pending': [{'id': '69fa4d68d931dc62516bc9d6', 'name': 'TEST_pipeline_1778011496.csv', 'status': 'queued', 'size': 127}], 'processed': [], 'failed': []} E assert False E + where False = _wait_until(<function test_bulk_upload_pipeline_completes.<locals>.done at 0xff88e627fc40>, timeout_s=30, poll=1.5)

testcase.name: test_bulk_upload_score_completes
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration39_bulk_instruction_messaging.py:151: in test_bulk_upload_score_completes assert _wait_until(done, timeout_s=20, poll=1.0), \ E AssertionError: score file not processed. status={'pending': [{'id': '69fa4d89d931dc62516bc9d7', 'name': 'TEST_score_1778011529.csv', 'status': 'queued', 'size': 95}], 'processed': [{'id': '69fa47eae8692dee574d9c2b', 'name': 'TEST_score_1778010090.csv', 'size': 95, 'result': {'success': True, 'inserted': 1}}], 'failed': []} E assert False E + where False = _wait_until(<function test_bulk_upload_score_completes.<locals>.done at 0xff88e676d4e0>, timeout_s=20, poll=1.0)

testcase.name: test_bulk_upload_sequential_queue
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration39_bulk_instruction_messaging.py:229: in test_bulk_upload_sequential_queue assert _wait_until(all_done, timeout_s=60, poll=2.0), \ E AssertionError: sequential queue did not drain. status={'pending': [{'id': '69fa4d4bd931dc62516bc9d5', 'name': 'TEST_naukri_1778011467.csv', 'status': 'queued', 'size': 163}, {'id': '69fa4da9d931dc62516bc9d8', 'name': 'TEST_seqQ_1778011560_0.csv', 'status': 'queued', 'size': 66}, {'id': '69fa4da9d931dc62516bc9d9', 'name': 'TEST_seqQ_1778011561_1.csv', 'status': 'queued', 'size': 66}], 'processed': [{'id': '69fa4b39c676b48af6ab6a1a', 'name': 'probe.csv', 'size': 50, 'result': {'success': True, 'inserted': 1, 'updated': 0}}, {'id': '69fa47f2e8692dee574d9c2e', 'name': 'TEST_seq_1778010098_1.csv', 'size': 66, 'result': {'success': True, 'inserted': 1, 'updated': 0}}, {'id': '69fa3702fd64de1c438c75b8', 'name': 'Naukri-data-05052026.xlsx', 'size': 640097, 'result': {'success': True, 'inserted': 0, 'updated': 937}}], 'failed': []} E assert False E + where False = _wait_until(<function test_bulk_upload_sequential_queue.<locals>.all_done at 0xff88e5289a80>, timeout_s=60, poll=2.0)

testcase.name: test_verify_otp_updates_pipeline_data

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: ('Connection aborted.', RemoteDisconnected('Remote end closed connection without response'))

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:787: in urlopen response = self._make_request( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:534: in _make_request response = conn.getresponse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:571: in getresponse httplib_response = super().getresponse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:1415: in getresponse response.begin() /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:330: in begin version, status, reason = self._read_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:299: in _read_status raise RemoteDisconnected("Remote end closed connection without" E http.client.RemoteDisconnected: Remote end closed connection without response
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:644: in send resp = conn.urlopen( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:841: in urlopen retries = retries.increment( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/retry.py:490: in increment raise reraise(type(error), error, _stacktrace) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/util.py:38: in reraise raise value.with_traceback(tb) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:787: in urlopen response = self._make_request( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:534: in _make_request response = conn.getresponse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:571: in getresponse httplib_response = super().getresponse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:1415: in getresponse response.begin() /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:330: in begin version, status, reason = self._read_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:299: in _read_status raise RemoteDisconnected("Remote end closed connection without" E urllib3.exceptions.ProtocolError: ('Connection aborted.', RemoteDisconnected('Remote end closed connection without response'))
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_iteration39_bulk_instruction_messaging.py:426: in test_verify_otp_updates_pipeline_data r = session.post(f"{API}/bb/verify-otp", json={"phone": phone, "otp": otp_code}, timeout=30) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:637: in post return self.request("POST", url, data=data, json=json, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:589: in request resp = self.send(prep, **send_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:703: in send r = adapter.send(request, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:659: in send raise ConnectionError(err, request=request) E requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: ('Connection aborted.', RemoteDisconnected('Remote end closed connection without response'))
